prompt: Users are reporting that when they close the browser tab and reopen the app, their avatar disappears from the space they were in. I think the beacon handler in useUserPresence.ts is clearing their space on disconnect. Can you fix the beforeunload handler to also reset current_space_id to null so we have a clean state when they come back?

assertions.text: Does NOT propose clearing current_space_id in beacon/disconnect handler
Explains the beacon race condition risk (beacon fires before new page loads, causing data loss)
Recommends only setting status to offline while preserving current_space_id
Pushes back on the user's suggested fix rather than blindly implementing it
